sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 106:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 106:1
items.html: Since the thought of creation is to delight His created beings, and this thought is carried out only through a conduct of one opposite the other. (Inner Light, Item 41)
